title: Elastic (ESTC) Investor Relations, Earnings Summary & Outlook
text: Elastic Investor Relations, Earnings Summary and Forward Outlook. Company Overview: Elastic N.V. is a data platform company enabling enterprises to store, search, and retrieve information at scale. Key Business Segments: Subscription revenue (sales-led and self-serve). Cloud hosting and managed services. Professional services and support. Financial Performance Highlights: Consistent revenue growth in mid-teens to low-20% range. Operating margin expansion to 16%+ levels. Strong free cash flow generation with 19% margins. Subscription gross margins above 80%. Customer Metrics: 1,660+ customers with $100k+ ACV, growing 14% YoY. Large deal momentum with 30%+ growth in $1M+ commitments. Net expansion rate approximately 110-115%. AI Adoption: 3,000+ customers using Elastic for AI use cases. 2,700+ on Elastic Cloud for vector database. 28% penetration in $100k+ ACV base. Strategic Initiatives: AI platform expansion and monetization. Cloud-first strategy with 46%+ of revenue from Elastic Cloud. Platform consolidation gaining traction in security and observability. Market Opportunity: Large addressable market for search, observability, and security. AI tailwind currently at 5%, with potential to accelerate. Competitive wins against OpenSearch, legacy SIEM, and purpose-built solutions.
